title: Export complete app as a single self-contained HTML file

requirements.summary: Create a standalone, self-contained single HTML file (frontend/public/standalone.html) that duplicates the full current application with inlined CSS, JavaScript, and assets, running without backend or build toolchain
acceptanceCriteria: A single file frontend/public/standalone.html exists and opens correctly in a browser without a local server or build step.

All pages and navigation (Home, About, Share Experience, Dashboard, Community Chat, Available Students, Wishlist, Post Detail) are represented and navigable within the single file using hash-based or in-page routing.
The file includes all CSS styles either via Tailwind CDN or inlined, matching the existing violet/neutral color palette and theme.
Sample/mock data is hardcoded to populate posts, college connect tips, feedback, community chat messages, and student profiles so every section appears populated.
Year selection modal appears on first load and year badges display correctly for all four years (1st–4th).
No external canister calls are made; all data interactions use in-memory JavaScript state.
The file renders correctly in modern browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari) without console errors.
Open Graph meta tags and the page title 'Mem Nerchukunnavi | మేము నేర్చుకున్నవి' are present in the <head>.

file_operations.description: Create a single self-contained HTML file that replicates the entire application. Include: (1) Complete <head> with page title 'Mem Nerchukunnavi | మేము నేర్చుకున్నవి' and Open Graph meta tags matching frontend/index.html; (2) Tailwind CSS via CDN (or fully inlined styles matching the violet/neutral theme from frontend/tailwind.config.js and frontend/src/index.css); (3) React, ReactDOM, and React Router UMD builds via CDN; (4) All fonts (Inter, Sora) via Google Fonts CDN or embedded; (5) Inline all application JavaScript: hash-based routing for all eight pages (Home with filterable posts, About, ShareExperience form, Dashboard with stats and feedback, CommunityChat, AvailableStudents with DM, Wishlist, PostDetail), YearSelectionModal that appears on first visit and persists selection to localStorage, Layout component with pill navigation and mobile menu, SparkParticles background animation, all page components and their UI logic; (6) Mock/hardcoded data arrays for posts (20+ samples across all categories and years), collegeConnects (10+ tips), feedbackEntries (8+ entries), chatMessages (15+ messages), studentProfiles (6+ students), and a sample DM conversation; (7) In-memory state management (no backend calls) using React useState/useReducer for wishlist, year selection, language toggle, toast notifications, sound mute, and all CRUD operations; (8) Inline all utility functions: sounds (bubble pop, typing tick with mute support), date formatting, year badge styling, category badge styling, translation helpers for English/Telugu; (9) Inline all component logic: PostCard with bookmark toggle, ChatMessageCard, CollegeConnectList, FeedbackSection, StudentCard with DM button, ShareButtons, ToastContainer, and all form components; (10) Embed generated images (frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/about-banner.dim_1200x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/memu-logo.dim_256x256.png) as base64 data URIs in the relevant sections (Home hero, About banner, favicon); (11) Ensure all interactive features work: category/year filters, post navigation, wishlist toggle with toast feedback, year badge color coding (violet-600 for 1st, violet-500 for 2nd, violet-400 for 3rd, neutral-500 for 4th), form submissions update mock data in-memory, chat auto-scroll, DM panel opens with sender name prompt, share buttons (copy link, WhatsApp, native share API), sound effects on interactions, language toggle between English and Telugu; (12) Style all components to match the existing theme: violet primary colors, neutral grays, rounded-xl cards, shadow-lg effects, pill-shaped badges and buttons, grid backgrounds, floating spark animations; (13) Ensure mobile responsiveness with hamburger menu on small screens; (14) Add inline comments explaining major sections for maintainability. The file must be fully functional as a static demo without any external dependencies beyond CDN links for React and Tailwind.
